Our Story

More Than a Hat Shop.
It's Your Experience.

Buckle Bunny Hat Bar was born from one simple belief: every woman deserves to feel like the main character. We don't rush. We don't push. We pour you a drink, pull up a chair, and help you bring the hat in your head to life — no matter how long it takes.

From brides looking for that perfect wedding-day piece to rodeo-season regulars refreshing their look, our space is designed for you to explore, create, and leave feeling like yourself — only more so.

— The Buckle Bunny Team

Buckle

How It Works

The Buckle Bunny Experience

01

Choose Your Hat

Browse our curated collection of hat styles and colors. Take your time — we mean it. Three hours? No problem. This is your moment.

02

Adorn & Customize

Select from ribbons, bands, thrifted brooches, feathers, and curated accessories. Our stylists guide your vision with expert suggestions tailored to you.

03

Walk Out Glowing

We handcraft your hat while you sip. Leave with a one-of-a-kind piece and the kind of experience you'll be telling everyone about.

What We Offer

Tailored to You

Signature

Custom Hat Experience

The full Buckle Bunny journey. Choose your base, select your adornments, and let our team bring your dream hat to life — on the spot.

Bridal

Bridal & Special Occasion

Bachelorette parties, weddings, and milestone celebrations. Custom bridal hats designed with the same care you put into every other detail of your big day.

Inquire

Refresh

Hat Glow-Up

Already have a hat you love? Bring it in and let us elevate it with new accessories, bands, brooches, and styling — no new hat required.

Love Notes

What They're Saying

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

I went to Buckle Bunny to create a custom hat for my wedding and it was the best experience! It took me three hours just to decide on the color, and I was never rushed. They truly helped bring my vision to life.

Nikki P. — Bridal Custom Hat

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

The team went above and beyond to make the event special, and it showed in every detail. They brought together the most thoughtfully curated vendors — each one perfectly aligned with the vibe. An unforgettable atmosphere.

Jessica E. — Rodeo Kickoff Party

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

There are a wide selection of hat styles and colors as well as tons of accessories. The team gave me great suggestions based on my style preferences. They offered drinks and were extremely helpful throughout the process.

Christina B. — Walk-In Visit

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

The staff was really patient and blew me away with how beautifully they put my hat together! The store is beautifully organized, and full of beautiful spirits ready to bring your visions to life.

Jordan P. — Party & Custom Hat

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Better than any candle or paint and sip. Highly recommended and will be back again.

Lance S. — Custom Hat Date Night
